servinfo.title: Transaxle Rear Cover (O/D and 2nd Coast Brake Piston) Assembly Inspection

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Transaxle Rear Cover (O/D and 2nd Coast Brake Piston) Assembly Disassembly and Reassembly

servinfosub.title: O/D and 2nd Coast Brake Return Spring Subassembly
servinfosub.ptxt: Measure free length of O/D and 2nd coast brake return spring.
If measured length is out of specified length, replace transaxle rear cover.

item.ptxt: Do not apply excessive force when measuring spring free length.

spec.title: O/D and 2nd coast brake return spring free length

servinfosub.title: Transaxle Rear Cover Bushing
servinfosub.ptxt: Measure bore of transaxle rear cover bushing (1) using special tool.
If check result is not as specification, replace transaxle rear cover. In replacement, intermediate shaft subassembly also needs to be checked. Replace intermediate shaft subassembly if necessary.
